llm_response: Dear Sarah, I hope you are having a wonderful week and that everything is going smoothly on your end. We are so excited to finally host you for a special dinner next Monday at 7, as this meal will mark the beginning of our new family tradition. Since we haven't seen each other in such a long time, we want to make sure this dinner is absolutely perfect for you. Please remember the old saying "千里之行，始于足下" (A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step), because our time together is the first step toward many more happy memories. We have already started planning the menu, and I promise the dinner will be delicious enough to make your mouth water. Thank you so much for accepting our invitation, and we are truly looking forward to it.
